# 🚀 CampusEdge Media — Full Website Build Prompt for GitHub Copilot (v2)
# Competitor-Informed — Beats EliteCreatorsHub & CreatorTube

> This file contains all instructions for building CampusEdge Media website.
> Copilot follows these instructions automatically across every file.

---

## 🎯 Project Overview

Build a complete, production-ready, one-page marketing website for **CampusEdge Media** — India's premier campus marketing agency specializing in **brand partnerships** and **influencer/creator marketing** targeting college students and universities.

**Tagline**: *"Bridging Brands, Creators & Education"*

**Key competitive advantage:**
> India has 37M+ college students — the world's largest youth demographic. CampusEdge OWNS this angle.

---

## 🛠️ Tech Stack

- Framework: React 18
- Build Tool: Vite 5
- Styling: CSS Modules + CSS Custom Properties
- Animations: Framer Motion
- Icons: Lucide React
- Fonts: Google Fonts — Syne (headings) + DM Sans (body)
- Deployment: Vercel

---

## 📋 All 14 Sections (in order)

1. Header (sticky nav)
2. Hero
3. BrandLogos
4. Stats bar
5. HowItWorks
6. CreatorPartners
7. UniversityPartners
8. Services (For Brands / For Creators)
9. CaseStudy
10. About
11. Testimonials
12. FAQ (accordion)
13. Contact (Formspree)
14. Footer
